services.name: pub.compress:compressData
services.description: WmPublic. Compresses the data before sending the HTTP request using any of the specified compression schemes.

input_parameters.name: data
input_parameters.description: Document. Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress. Specify data using one of the following keys. Important: When you use more than one key, string is appended first, bytes is appended second, and stream is appended last and Integration Server uses the first key that it encounters.

input_parameters.name: string
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. Text that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

input_parameters.name: bytes
input_parameters.description: byte[ ]. Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

input_parameters.name: stream
input_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream. Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:compressData service to compress.

input_parameters.name: compressionScheme
input_parameters.description: String. The compression method you want the pub.compress:compressData service to apply to compress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
input_parameters.description: String. Form in which you want the pub.compress:compressData service to store the output data. Set to: bytes to store the data as a byte[ ]. stream to store the data as a java.io.InputStream.

input_parameters.name: encoding
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Name of a registered, IANA character set that specifies the encoding to use when converting the String to an array of bytes (for example: ISO-8859-1).

output_parameters.name: compressedData
output_parameters.description: Document. Compressed data after applying the compression scheme.

output_parameters.name: bytes
output_parameters.description: byte[ ]. Conditional. Compressed data represented as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

output_parameters.name: stream
output_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream. Conditional. Compressed data represented as an InputStream. stream is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.

services.name: pub.compress:decompressData
services.description: WmPublic. Decompresses the data based on the response header of the HTTP response.

input_parameters.name: data
input_parameters.description: Document. Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress. Specify data using one of the following keys.

input_parameters.name: bytes
input_parameters.description: byte[ ]. Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress.

input_parameters.name: stream
input_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream. Optional. Data that you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to decompress.

input_parameters.name: compressionScheme
input_parameters.description: String. The compression scheme you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to apply to decompress the data. The supported compression schemes are gzip and deflate.

input_parameters.name: loadAs
input_parameters.description: String. Form in which you want the pub.compress:decompressData service to store the returned document. Set to: bytes to return the data as a byte[ ]. stream to return the data as a java.io.InputStream.

output_parameters.name: decompressedData
output_parameters.description: Document. Decompressed data after applying the compression algorithm.

output_parameters.name: bytes
output_parameters.description: byte[ ]. Conditional. Decompressed data represented as a byte[ ]. bytes is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to bytes.

output_parameters.name: stream
output_parameters.description: java.io.InputStream. Conditional. The decompressed data represented as an InputStream. stream is returned only when the loadAs input parameter is set to stream.
